rules.description: Migrate to Azure Kubernetes Service on Azure Local for enhanced capabilities. The platform recommends migrating to Azure Kubernetes Service on Azure Local for improved features.
rules.query: where properties['distribution'] in ('aks_management','aks_workload') | where properties['infrastructure'] contains 'vSphere' | where properties['kind'] !~ ('ProvisionedCluster')
rules.fix: Migrate to Azure Kubernetes Service on Azure Local for enhanced capabilities. The platform recommends migrating to Azure Kubernetes Service on Azure Local for improved features.

rules.description: Deploying, upgrading, and scaling Azure Kubernetes Service on Windows Server 2019 and Windows Server 2022 is blocked.
rules.query: where properties['distribution'] in ('aks_management','aks_workload') | where properties['infrastructure'] == 'azure_stack_hci' | where ['kind'] != ('ProvisionedCluster')
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation

rules.description: Azure Kubernetes Service's current architecture on Windows Server 2019 and Windows Server 2022 is retiring. Replace existing Azure Kubernetes Service clusters on Windows Server 2019, Windows Server 2022 or Azure Local, version 22H2 with Azure Kubernetes Service on Azure Local, version 23H2 or later.
rules.query: where properties['distribution'] in~ ('aks_management','aks_workload') and properties['infrastructure'] =~ 'azure_stack_hci' and ['kind'] != ('ProvisionedCluster')
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation
